title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: MERLO STATION HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1841 SW Merlo Drive Beaverton, OR 97003 Eligibility: Students only Hours: During school year: Monday/Wednesday/Thrusday 8am-12pm and 12:30pm-3pm, Friday-closed (503) 941-3210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 941-3210 Main phone Main phone (503) 941-3210 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The Merlo Rd/SW 158th Ave MAX Station is located a few blocks away from the school and services the Blue Line. Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MERLO STATION HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
